arts.ttl: Napoli Talisman On the Brink of Equaling Personal Scoring Record
arts.sum: New Napoli talisman Scott McTominay could equal his best-ever scoring record in a single club season this weekend. According to Corriere dello Sport, only Milan's Tijjani Reijnders has been a more prolific midfielder in Serie A than the Scottish star this season. The post Napoli Talisman On the Brink of Equaling Personal Scoring Record appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Why Scott McTominay 'stands out' at Napoli as adoring skipper reveals what has impressed him the most
arts.sum: The Scotland star has hit six goals in 22 Serie A matches to help Napoli top the table going into the final 13 games of the season
